name: Pacified
desc: A heavy calming scent has flooded this creature's senses, leaving it dazed and sluggish.
apply_message: The heavy scent hits you and everything goes foggy.
remove_message: The haze clears from your head.

name: Soothing Vapors
desc: Medicinal vapors are slowly closing wounds and easing pain.
apply_message: A gentle warmth washes over you as the healing vapors take effect.
remove_message: The healing vapors thin out and fade.
